holdings.infoBox: TGRT is an equity ETF with a total of 90 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.74%, Apple at 10.25%, Alphabet at 8.52%, Microsoft at 7.67%, and Broadcom at 5.50%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Growth ETF (TGRT) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 1219.39m in AUM and 90 holdings. TGRT is an actively managed fund that invests in US large-cap companies believed to have strong growth potential TGRT was launched on Jun 14, 2023 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.
